calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-21-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: 10:27 am
Appearances:
James Blanding, the son for Plaintiff James F. Blanding.
Rudy Balderama, Esq. for Defendants JOse Cuadra, Areli MOjica and Edwin Cuadra.
Spanish Intrpreter Margot Seely is present.

Defendant raises the issue of the party present now is not the Plaintiff and has no standing. The Court asks Mr. Blanding if he is the Plaintiff. Plaintiff reports he is part owner, and he is the son. The Court orders Mr. James Blanding the Plaintiff to be present at 2:00 pm today for trial assignment. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-14-2016 Continued To Mar-21-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 10
Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff James Blanding is present in Pro Per.
Defendants Jose Cuadra, Edwin Cuadra, Areli Mojica are present.
Spanish Court Interpreter Carla Cuevas/Laura Villanueva are present.
Attorney Mehran Fardis appearing for defendants in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of March 14, 2016 remains on calendar. (501/jpt)
